policy.reviewCadence: weekly scheduled audit plus review before expiry
policy.verificationMode: unignored pnpm audit JSON is retained as a CI artifact

exceptions.rationale: Pre-existing pnpm audit suppression inherited by AUDIT-2; no safety conclusion is implied until the unignored inventory identifies the dependency path and fix status.
compensatingControls: Security Audit runs on pull requests, main/develop pushes, and a weekly schedule.
Dependencies are installed from pnpm-lock.yaml with --frozen-lockfile in CI.
The AUDIT-2 exception inventory retains the unignored audit JSON and matched registry output.
exceptions.removalCondition: Remove the identifier from pnpm.auditConfig.ignoreCves when the resolved dependency is fixed, no longer present, or the unignored audit no longer reports it.
